title: Goa Tourism Holdings Services is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Goa Tourism Holdings Services is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Guest Relations Manager with drive and ambition, Goa Tourism Holdings Services in Mysuru is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Goa Tourism Holdings Services:
Goa Tourism Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Goa Tourism Holdings Services!
